items.name_cn:
Chanel SS2022 Fall/Winter New Collection
Size: 15.5x25.5x6.5(cm)
22p Fall/Winter New Sparkling Flap Bag, the most beautiful CF of the year ✔️
Black fabric surface inlaid with many square rhinestones ⚪️ Silver sparkling crystal rhinestones bling✨bling, extremely dazzling 👀 Silver rhinestones spliced into a rose 🌹 shape, truly the finishing touch 🐲, instantly elevating the bag's noble quality! Equipped with CF vintage woven metal shoulder strap, small and exquisite ☑️
Uses original fabric and hardware, 1:1 restoration of the authentic look
Multiple carrying styles: Shoulder, Crossbody, Handheld. Suitable for any height, easy to carry 〰️

items.name_en: Chanel SS2023 Pre-Fall Slot Machine Collection, Authentic Style
items.name_cn:
Chanel SS2023 Pre-Fall Slot Machine Collection, Authentic Style
Size: 9x16x4(cm)
23c Pre-Fall Resort Collection Preview
The most anticipated is the slot machine collector series mini bag from the show, which didn't disappoint in person. Quite exquisite and substantial. As shown in the photo, pressing the pearl clasp on top reveals decent capacity. It can't fit a standard iPhone, but it can fit an iPhone 4 size. It's perfectly fine for carrying other odds and ends like confidence, beauty, and elegance.

items.name_cn:
Chanel Vintage Medium Straw Bag🍂
Size: 20*36*9cm
Grandma 👵 loves the wheat ear 🌾 element, often seen on vintage jewelry 💍. At the 2010 Spring/Summer show, Karl Lagerfeld recreated a farm 👩‍🌾 scene at the Grand Palais. This woven bag 🍃 is from this series. Soft and chewy, feels great, like lying in a barn 🌾 pile 😌. Only a relaxed seaside vacation 🏖️ matches a woven bag. The sea breeze 🌊 in early autumn is cozy and gentle, just like this charming woven bag 👝

items.name_en: Chanel vintage Victoria Beckham Backpack Limited Edition
items.name_cn:
Chanel vintage Victoria Beckham Backpack Limited Edition
Chanel jumbo Victoria Beckham backpack. The backpack version of the Victoria Beckham bag is very special, plus the large double C logo, it's handsome and eye-catching, very stylish. It's hard to find someone with the same bag. Very vintage. Has a built-in zipper, very practical. A bag suitable for both personal use and collection.
AS1102 Dimensions: 28*8*20cm
